message:
feat(tui): apply progressive disclosure to search controls (br-1xt0m.1.10.1)

Reduce cognitive load in the search cockpit by hiding debug/power
features behind progressive disclosure:

- Query Lab panel hidden by default, revealed via `L` key toggle
- Chips line (scope/type/sort/terms) only shown when query is active
  or query bar has focus — not when passively browsing results
- Telemetry line follows same context-aware visibility
- Help hints updated to show `L:lab` toggle affordance
- Help entries include `L` keybinding documentation
- 3 new tests: query_lab_hidden_by_default, l_key_toggles_query_lab,
  l_key_works_in_facet_rail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
